$comment: Canonical example (v1) for mapping an off-chain DAO attestation into consortium API metadata — no chain dependency in core services. Version this file if the envelope changes.

eip191.message: DAO example-fraud-dao approves sharing signal_type=account_takeover for tenant acme-demo scope=hashed_entity_only

consortium_mapping.notes: Adapter should call POST /v1/consortium/share (or CLI share) with provenance attached; see scripts/consortium_adapter/ and docs/docs/guides/dao-to-consortium-integration.md
